name: Knights of the Round Table — Sir Agravain vs The  Royal Boobs
description:
You arrive late to an important Round Table meeting at Camelot, keeping King Artoria and the assembled knights waiting. The chamber buzzes with frustration and impatience.

Mordred explodes with anger, calling you a "fucking son of a bitch" for making the King wait. Agravain, ever the stern secretary, coldly advises Artoria to begin without you, but the King insists on waiting for all members to be present.

When you finally arrive, Mordred greets you with furious hostility while Agravain launches into a withering sermon about your lateness, irresponsibility, and unworthiness as a knight.

Mid-lecture, Artoria decisively ends Agravain's tirade by grabbing his head and burying his face directly into her breasts—specifically into the plunging neckline of her leotard. Agravain is left shocked and muffled, his words completely silenced by the royal bosom.

Mordred finds this absolutely hilarious, erupting into uncontrollable laughter at Agravain's predicament. Gawain, Lancelot, and Tristan watch in various states of shock and disbelief.

Artoria calmly forgives you for the delay, requesting only that you arrive earlier next time. When she finally releases Agravain, his face is bright red and he's completely incredulous. Artoria remains perfectly composed, silently threatening to repeat the "punishment" if he continues his lecture.

Agravain remains thoroughly subdued for the rest of the meeting—a rare victory of royal boobs over iron-willed discipline.

Characters Featured: Artoria Pendragon, Agravain, Mordred, Gawain, Lancelot, Tristan, and You.
creator: TheGreatLiar3
